notes: Volusia County FL Clerk (Laura E. Roth) — PROPRIETARY in-house ASP.NET WebForms portal at app02.clerk.org/or_m/ ('z-Proprietary' per FL_Examples.md row 12). Adapter: adapters/volusia_or_m_adapter.py. Flow: GET inquiry.aspx (harvest __VIEWSTATE/__EVENTVALIDATION) -> POST inquiry.aspx with __EVENTTARGET=ctl00$ContentPlaceHolder1$search. doctype option VALUES ARE RIGHT-PADDED TO 20 CHARS (e.g. 'DEED' + 16 spaces). Results grid: one <tr> per PARTY with Direction column D(irect/grantor)|R(everse/grantee) — adapter merges rows per instrument. Direct retrieval: Default.aspx?s=orapr&i={instrument} (pattern confirmed via VCPA sale-history hyperlinks). NO captcha, NO disclaimer on or_m per the 2026-01-13 Wayback capture. STATUS=stub because clerk.org GEO-BLOCKS non-US egress IPs at TCP level (connection refused ~300ms; probed 2026-06-10 from a 49.x IN IP) — live validation requires US egress (VPN/proxy) before flipping to in_progress. Form/grid shapes were captured from the Internet Archive snapshot saved at tests/fixtures/volusia/or_m_inquiry_wayback_20260113.html; parser tests green (tests/unit/test_volusia_or_m_adapter_scaffold.py). Test subjects: GUILD (MARYKE Y + JUSTIN P, 435 ELSIE AVE, HOLLY HILL 32117, APN 533705070110, altkey 3470141); CUDDY (JAY N + SUZETTE M, 11 LITTLE TOMOKA WAY, ORMOND BEACH).
